service_summary:
With Automation as a Service we focus on automating repetitive tasks or services to improve efficiency and reduce errors. From a technology point-of-view we use the Cegeka Hybrid Cloud standard software tools to streamline processes and enhance service delivery across various sectors.
Key aspects of Service Automation
standard services:
Provide automation support for the HC and DWP competences from ideation over analysis & design to implementation phase
Automation support has to be considered on different levels and aspects:
Automation requests are collected & consolidated based on the input of the other competences (technical CC’s within delivery, change management & architecture)
service request:
Requests related to this Service can be ordered and will result in the execution of that request by means of a Cegeka change order. Each request has a throughput time to deliver the request (after approval or pre-approval on the customer’s CAB). | Service request id | service request | Throughput time | | | User mgmt. (add, remove, delete, etc) | | | | OS mgmt. activities (disk extensions, CPU, reboot, etc) | | | | DB and application mgmt (MFT, DB, IWS, AMQ etc) | |
Service request id service request Throughput time User mgmt. (add, remove, delete, etc) OS mgmt. activities (disk extensions, CPU, reboot, etc) DB and application mgmt (MFT, DB, IWS, AMQ etc)
out_of_scope: Everything that is not explicitly mentioned in this service descriptions is by default out of scope.
conditions:
The tooling to support automations needs to be provided and maintained by Cegeka competence teams.
For example:
A test environment will be set up to test the automations for HC, DWP and DIO.
cegeka owned licenses and/or subscriptio:
These licenses and/or subscriptions and their cost are included in this Service. It is Cegeka’s responsibility to maintain license and/or subscription compliance. Licenses and/or subscriptions used for Enabling Services are included in the Service and are not listed below. | License | included in service | applies to | | 300 Atlassian licenses | yes | Atlassian tools (Jira & Confluence) Yearly renewable | | | | | | | | | | | | |
License included in service applies to 300 Atlassian licenses yes Atlassian tools (Jira & Confluence)Yearly renewable
customer_licenses:
These licenses and/or subscriptions and their cost are not included in this Service. It is Customer responsibility to maintain license and/or subscription compliance. | License | description/remarks | | Horizon | Optional license (product) to be purchased from Cegeka when the customer wishes to access the automations via Horizon | | | | | | | | | |
License description/remarks Horizon Optional license (product) to be purchased from Cegeka when the customer wishes to access the automations via Horizon
location: This Service is not delivered from within the Customer premises. Only from the Cegeka (virtual) Office Environment.
ownership: All development and hardware used to disclose the automations remains property of Cegeka. Scripts and automation flows are intellectual property of Cegeka, even the ones specifically developed for the customer.
